calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Continuance Of Trial Date And Trial Related Deadlines
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Off Calendar

Defendant Pacific Gas And Electric Company Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shelley Bryant, Esq. 559-494-4910 of Bryant Whitten LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Robert Hulteng, Esq. 415-433-1940 and Aurelio Perez, Esq. 415-370-5706 of Littler for Defendant.
PG & E.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court asks questions re: compliance with the CRC, collateral estoppel issue, retaliation, whether arbitration is binding on a statutory claim,
Reed vs. Safeway. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Pacific Gas And Electric Company's Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Taken Under Submission. The Court will read the case Plaintiff has cited and will let parties know if any supplemental briefing is needed. The Court will have a decision by the end of business on Thursday.
